models.title: OpenAI’s cozy partner Cerebras is on track for a blockbuster IPO
models.summary: AI chip maker Cerebras is heading for a blockbuster IPO that could value it at $26.6 billion or more. Its relationship with OpenAI is deep and rich.
models.title_zh: OpenAI舒适的合作伙伴Cerebras正在进行一场轰动一时的首次公开募股
models.summary_zh: 人工智能芯片制造商Cerebras正在进行一场轰动一时的IPO ，其估值可能达到266亿美元或更高。它与OpenAI的关系深厚而丰富。
models.title_en: OpenAI’s cozy partner Cerebras is on track for a blockbuster IPO
models.summary_en: AI chip maker Cerebras is heading for a blockbuster IPO that could value it at $26.6 billion or more. Its relationship with OpenAI is deep and rich.

models.title: Image AI models now drive app growth, beating chatbot upgrades
models.summary: Appfigures finds visual model launches generate 6.5x more downloads — but most don’t convert that spike into revenue.
models.title_zh: Image AI模型现在推动应用程序增长，击败聊天机器人升级
models.summary_zh: Appfigures发现，视觉模型的发布产生了6.5倍的下载量，但大多数都不会将其转化为收入。
models.title_en: Image AI models now drive app growth, beating chatbot upgrades
models.summary_en: Appfigures finds visual model launches generate 6.5x more downloads — but most don’t convert that spike into revenue.

models.title: Elon Musk’s only AI expert witness at the OpenAI trial fears an AGI arms race
models.summary: Stuart Russell is a long-time AI researcher who thinks governments need to restrain frontier labs.
models.title_zh: 埃隆·马斯克（ Elon Musk ）在OpenAI审判中唯一的人工智能专家证人担心AGI军备竞赛
models.summary_zh: Stuart Russell是一位长期的人工智能研究人员，他认为政府需要限制前沿实验室。
models.title_en: Elon Musk’s only AI expert witness at the OpenAI trial fears an AGI arms race
models.summary_en: Stuart Russell is a long-time AI researcher who thinks governments need to restrain frontier labs.

models.title: Sierra raises $950M as the race to own enterprise AI gets serious
models.summary: The raise gives Sierra more than $1 billion to work with — capital the company says it will use to become the "global standard" for AI-powered customer experiences.
models.title_zh: Sierra筹集了9.5亿美元$ ，因为拥有企业AI的竞争变得越来越激烈
models.summary_zh: 此次融资为Sierra提供了超过10亿美元的合作资金--该公司表示，它将利用这笔资金成为人工智能客户体验的“全球标准”。
models.title_en: Sierra raises $950M as the race to own enterprise AI gets serious
models.summary_en: The raise gives Sierra more than $1 billion to work with — capital the company says it will use to become the "global standard" for AI-powered customer experiences.
